description: Writes take Variable (Variable) as an input, and the type that Variable wraps will determine what Value (Generic) will take as a value. The node will then write Value (Generic) to the field Variable (Variable) wraps.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Call this to write the value.
fields.Value: Value to write to the value pointed to by Variable (Variable)
fields.OnWritten: sends an impulse after * (Call) has been impulsed and the value has been written.
fields.OnFail: sends an impulse after * (Call) has been impulsed and the value wasn't able to be written due to a missing target or a missing Variable (Variable) value

notes.title: Optimizations
notes.text: The Write node can also be used to write to a Protoflux Source node instead of writing to a variable that is connected to a Drive node, enabling programs be be written with one less supporting node per Write node
